name: Design Brief
description: Plan user flows and UI before writing any code

steps.name: Map Core User Flow
steps.prompt: Let's design the user experience. First, map the core user flow from entry to success. How does someone discover your product and achieve their goal?
instructions: Start from: How does user discover this?
Map each step to reach core value
End at: User achieves goal (and pays)
Keep flow under 5 steps for MVP

inputs.label: ENTRY - How do they arrive?
inputs.placeholder: e.g., Lands on landing page from Twitter

inputs.label: HOOK - What grabs attention? (3 seconds)
inputs.placeholder: e.g., Sees 'Write 10x faster' headline + demo

inputs.label: VALUE - Core action that delivers value
inputs.placeholder: e.g., Tries free generation (1 sample)

inputs.label: CONVERT - Payment/signup trigger
inputs.placeholder: e.g., Hits paywall for more generations

inputs.label: SUCCESS - User achieves their goal
inputs.placeholder: e.g., Pays, generates unlimited content

steps.name: Define Key Screens
steps.prompt: List every screen needed for MVP. Maximum 5-7 screens. Each screen should have ONE primary purpose.
instructions: Landing page is almost always needed

inputs.label: Screen 1
inputs.defaultValue: Landing Page - Convert visitors - Click 'Get Started'

inputs.label: Screen 3 (Main App)
inputs.placeholder: Dashboard - [Purpose] - [Primary Action]

inputs.label: Screen 4 (optional)
inputs.placeholder: [Screen] - [Purpose] - [Action]

inputs.label: Screen 5 (optional)
inputs.placeholder: [Screen] - [Purpose] - [Action]

inputs.label: Screen 6 (optional)
inputs.placeholder: [Screen] - [Purpose] - [Action]

inputs.label: Screen 7 (optional)
inputs.placeholder: [Screen] - [Purpose] - [Action]

validation.message: Need at least 3 screens, maximum 7 for MVP

steps.name: Design Landing Page Hero
steps.prompt: Let's design the landing page hero section. This is what visitors see first - it needs to hook them in 3 seconds.

inputs.label: Headline (10 words max)
inputs.placeholder: e.g., Ship faster with AI-powered code reviews

inputs.label: Subheadline
inputs.placeholder: e.g., Get instant feedback on your pull requests...

inputs.label: CTA Button Text
inputs.placeholder: e.g., Start Free, Get Started, Try Now

inputs.label: Hero Visual Description
inputs.placeholder: e.g., Screenshot of main dashboard showing...
inputs.helpText: What visual will appear next to the headline?

steps.name: Design Landing Page Features
steps.prompt: Define 3 key features to highlight on the landing page. Each needs an icon, headline, and one-line description.
instructions: Each feature = icon + headline + one line
Features should map to P0 from contract

inputs.label: Feature 1 Icon (Lucide name)
inputs.placeholder: e.g., Zap, Sparkles, Shield

steps.name: Design Pricing Display
steps.prompt: How will pricing be displayed on the landing page? Reference your locked revenue model.
instructions: Keep it simple - one price for v1

inputs.label: What's Included (bullet points)
inputs.placeholder:
- Unlimited X
- Feature Y
- Priority support
- etc.

inputs.label: Pricing CTA Text
inputs.placeholder: e.g., Start Now, Get Access, Buy Now

steps.name: Define Key Interactions
steps.prompt: Let's define the key interactions. What happens when users click buttons, submit forms, or trigger actions?

inputs.label: Core Feature Interaction
inputs.placeholder: e.g., User clicks Generate → Loading spinner → Result appears → Success toast
inputs.helpText: Describe the main feature interaction flow

inputs.label: Form Submit Pattern
inputs.defaultValue: Click submit → Loading state → Validation → Success toast or inline error

inputs.label: Error Handling Pattern
inputs.defaultValue: Show inline error message + toast.error with friendly message

inputs.label: Loading State Pattern
inputs.defaultValue: Skeleton loaders for content, spinners for actions

steps.name: Select shadcn/ui Components
steps.prompt: Which shadcn/ui components will you need? Check all that apply.
instructions: Add more as needed during dev
These are starting components, not final list

steps.name: Confirm Responsive Strategy
steps.prompt: Confirm your responsive design strategy. Mobile-first is required.

inputs.label: Any special breakpoint considerations?
inputs.placeholder: e.g., Dashboard needs sidebar on desktop only...

steps.name: Document Design Decisions
steps.prompt: Any other design decisions to document? Layout choices, color usage, special considerations?

inputs.label: Additional Design Notes
inputs.placeholder: Any other design decisions or considerations...

steps.name: Generate Design Brief
steps.prompt: I'll create your Design Brief document and save it to the vault.
instructions: Include user flow, screens, landing page structure

artifacts.template:
# Design Brief: {productName}

**Date:** {date}
**Design System:** Reference `_design-system/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md`

---

## Core User Flow

```
ENTRY → {entryPoint}
  ↓
HOOK → {hookPoint}
  ↓
VALUE → {valuePoint}
  ↓
CONVERT → {convertPoint}
  ↓
SUCCESS → {successPoint}
```

---

## Screen Inventory

| # | Screen | Purpose | Primary Action |
|---|--------|---------|----------------|
| 1 | {screen1} |
| 2 | {screen2} |
| 3 | {screen3} |
| 4 | {screen4} |
| 5 | {screen5} |
| 6 | {screen6} |
| 7 | {screen7} |

---

## Landing Page Structure

### Hero
- **Headline:** {heroHeadline}
- **Subheadline:** {heroSubheadline}
- **CTA:** {heroCta}
- **Visual:** {heroVisual}

### Features Section
1. **{feature1Headline}** ({feature1Icon}): {feature1Description}
2. **{feature2Headline}** ({feature2Icon}): {feature2Description}
3. **{feature3Headline}** ({feature3Icon}): {feature3Description}

### Pricing Section
- Display: {pricingDisplay}
- Includes:
{pricingIncludes}
- CTA: {pricingCta}

---

## Key Interactions

| Element | Interaction | Feedback |
|---------|-------------|----------|
| Core Feature | {coreInteraction} |
| Form Submit | {formSubmitPattern} |
| Errors | {errorPattern} |
| Loading | {loadingPattern} |

---

## Component Checklist (shadcn/ui)

Selected components from checklist.

---

## Responsive Strategy

- **Mobile-first:** Yes
- **Breakpoints:** 320px → 768px → 1024px
- **Notes:** {breakpointNotes}

---

## Design Decisions

| Decision | Choice | Reasoning |
|----------|--------|----------|
| Layout | {layoutChoice} | MVP simplicity |

**Additional Notes:**
{additionalNotes}

qualityGates.description: Clear path from landing to paid conversion
qualityGates.errorMessage: User flow must include conversion point

qualityGates.description: Know which shadcn/ui components to use

qualityGates.errorMessage: Design brief must be saved to vault

transition.message: Design brief complete! You now have IDEA, CONTRACT, REVENUE, and DESIGN docs. Ready to set up the project.

pitfalls.fix: Hard cap at 7 screens for MVP
Landing page IS the product for visitors
